title: Chewy's Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Active Customer Sales Increase Y/Y
text: Chewy's Q1 2024 net sales exceeded the high end of their guidance range, increasing by approximately 3% to $2.88 billion. The company's earnings beat consensus estimates, driven by strong operational efficiency. Autoship was a major driver of performance with record levels totaling $2.2 billion and representing 77.6% of net sales in Q1 2024. The scaled Autoship business continued to be a pillar of strength and differentiation for Chewy, driving predictable subscription-like revenue and demonstrating the company's ability to deepen customer relationships. The strong Q1 performance set the tone for a year of accelerating profitability and confirmed management guidance was conservative.
